name: SensorPush

customparams.name: use_short_poll_updates
customparams.title: Use Short Poll Updates
customparams.desc: Default is false (No/0): set true for 1-minute test updates; false for 5-minute production updates.

customparams.name: sample_limit
customparams.title: Sample Limit
customparams.desc: How many samples to request per sensor (default 1).

customparams.name: sensor_stale_hours
customparams.title: Sensor Stale Hours
customparams.desc: Alert when no fresh sample is seen for this many hours (default 24).

customparams.name: sensor_stale_notify_recovery
customparams.title: Notify On Recovery
customparams.desc: Send ntfy when a stale sensor starts reporting again (default true).

customparams.name: ntfy_topic
customparams.title: ntfy Topic
customparams.desc: Optional: set to enable push notifications via ntfy (example: my-home-sensors).

customparams.name: ntfy_token
customparams.title: ntfy Access Token
customparams.desc: Optional bearer token for private ntfy topics.

description: PG3 for SensorPush cloud API with configurable short/long poll update mode.
